title: senecio eriobasis
intro: Senecio eriobasis, also known as Mountain Arnoldy or Mountain Groundsel, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Senecio eriobasis include its potential to help treat conditions such as arthritis, gout, and skin irritations, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Senecio eriobasis can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and it has also been used in folk remedies for its antiseptic and wound-healing properties.
